creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 164350
svn diff for sysutils/hwstat

sysutils/hwstat is currently marked BROKEN && unfetchable.
The attached patch (svn diff) gives this hwstat a new home.

Changes:

Makefile
adds
MASTER_SITES   adds 2 sites, ipv4 && IPv6
removes
BROKEN

pkg-sescr
WWW change to reflect new home

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
